args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

This document records the read/write operations performed on the Hono routing module source files. All notes are plain and safe; source code is not modified.

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono HTTP framework class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up default router configuration using SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
- Simple note: Default constructor creates SmartRouter with [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] fallback chain.

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Base module providing the core Hono class with routing methods (get, post, use, route, mount), error handling, and request dispatch logic.
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, compose, getPath, mergePath, basePath, route, mount, onError, notFound, addRoute, #dispatch, fetch, request.
- Simple note: Implements request lifecycle from HTTP entry point through handler composition and routing via `this.router.match()`.

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter - a regex-based routing engine that compiles path patterns into compiled regular expressions.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter class from router.ts.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter which converts URL path patterns with named parameters (e.g., `/:id`) into compiled RegExp for matching.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams, Route.
- Simple note: Uses RegExp construction from path parsing with support for wildcard `*` and named parameters like `:paramName`.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter - a linear search router that maintains an ordered list of routes.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter class from router.ts.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter with linear iteration over routes, handling wildcards, named parameters, and static paths.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES_LOOP, ROUTES_MATCH.
- Simple note: Routes are stored as array and matched sequentially; supports `*` wildcard, `:param` labels, and static paths.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter - builds a trie structure and generates a compiled regular expression for fast pattern matching.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
- Simple note: Main exports are RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter for serialized/distributed deployments.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: Core RegExpRouter implementation using trie structure, compiled regex, and static route maps for efficient matching.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, ParamAssocArray, Trie, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, buildAllMatchers.
- Simple note: Builds matcher once during `buildAllMatchers()` using trie + regex combination; caches middleware and routes separately.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines Matcher interface and provides match() function that executes regex matching and returns handler list with param stash.
- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, ParamIndexMap, Result, emptyParam, match.
- Simple note: Returns `[RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap]` triple for matching; uses static map for direct lookups.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter supports pre-compiled routers for deployment/serialization, with buildInitParams and serializeInitParams helpers.
- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RelocateMap.
- Simple note: Takes pre-built matchers and relocateMap; supports dynamic route addition after construction.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Node class forming the trie tree structure for path segments in RegExpRouter.
- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR.
- Simple note: Trie nodes with children keyed by regex patterns or literal strings; inserts path tokens and builds regex string.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Trie class managing the root trie node, inserting tokenized paths and generating final RegExp with index/param mappings.
- Names noticed: Trie, Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp.
- Simple note: Tokenizes paths with group markers, builds trie, outputs `[RegExp, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap]`.

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter - a dispatcher that tries multiple routers sequentially and uses the first successful match.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter class from router.ts.

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: SmartRouter iterates through a list of routers (e.g., RegExpRouter + TrieRouter), using first one that successfully matches.
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, activeRouter.
- Simple note: Tries each router in order; caches first successful router; name becomes `SmartRouter + <activeRouter.name>`.

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter - path matching using a trie data structure without regex compilation.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter class from router.ts.

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: TrieRouter implementation using Node trie directly for method and path matching, returning handlers with params.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter.
- Simple note: Insertion stores method, path, handler in trie; search traverses path segments and collects matching handlers.

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Node class implementing trie structure for routes with method-specific handlers and pattern matching capabilities.
- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet.
- Simple note: Each node tracks methods; supports literal paths, `*` wildcard, and named parameter patterns via regex.

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test utility for defining common routing test suites usable across all router implementations.
- Names noticed: runTest, getSuiteHierarchy.
- Simple note: Provides `runTest()` function accepting skip rules and newRouter factory; defines common test cases like Basic Usage, Wildcard, Regexp, Optional route.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter using common test suite plus router-specific cases like UnsupportedPathError and trailing slash handling.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest.
- Simple note: Skips Duplicate param name (self) and Trailing slash test due to PatternRouter behavior differences.

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter using common test suite plus UnsupportedPathError cases and trailing slash handling.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest.
- Simple note: Skips Multi match with params, Complex with {.*} regexp, and Trailing slash test due to LinearRouter limitations.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter using common test suite plus UnsupportedPathError cases, Return value type, and ambiguous route validation.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest.
- Simple note: Skips Duplicate param (parent/child), Complex capturing group, and Including slashes /js/:filename test.

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Minimal tests for SmartRouter which delegates to underlying routers (RegExpRouter + TrieRouter combo).
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: Uses default router combination [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] and runs common test suite.

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter using common test suite - fully passes all common routing scenarios.
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest.
- Simple note: No skips - TrieRouter supports full test suite including all edge cases.

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

- Purpose: Low-level tests for TrieRouter Node class focusing on search behavior, multi-match ordering, and handler prioritization.
- Names noticed: Node, insert, search.
- Simple note: Tests cover root node behavior, wildcard *, named params, regex patterns, All method, Duplicate param, Sort Order, and Complex multi-match scenarios.

## Cross-File Checklist

- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts

---

## Verification

- File created: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
- Directory created: bench-artifacts/
- All 24 listed files read successfully.
- No source code modifications were made.
- Only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created as specified.
